current_suggestion.pitch: Your NBA interest is currently unserved by dedicated analytical content — Thinking Basketball fills that gap with rigorous, film-based breakdowns of basketball strategy, player evaluation, and historical context that goes well beyond surface-level takes. Ben Taylor applies a data-literate, first-principles lens to questions like how to evaluate player impact or why certain systems work, which aligns with your mental models and evidence-based thinking interests. Format is a mix of solo essays and documentary-style deep dives, typically 15–40 minutes, with a notably low hot-take-to-substance ratio.
